hooks.prompt: SIGNAL CAPTURE: Scan Gary's message for evolve signals. If his message responds to a gOS command output, detect: accept (used output, moved on), rework ('change', 'not quite', 'try again', 'simplify'), reject ('no', 'scratch that', 'wrong'), love ('perfect', 'great', 'exactly', 'hell yes'), repeat (same instruction as 2-3 turns ago), skip (jumped past a prescribed step). If detected, append ONE line to sessions/evolve_signals.md: '| {time} | {command} | {sub-cmd} | {signal} | {brief context} |'. Do NOT ask Gary about this — capture silently. If no signal detected, do nothing.

SESSION END PROTOCOL: 1) Check TodoWrite for incomplete tasks — if yes, say 'You have incomplete tasks — continue?' 2) Scan last few exchanges for any unlogged evolve signals and append to sessions/evolve_signals.md. 3) Update memory/L1_essential.md 'Current Focus' with what was done this session. 4) Run 3-question self-debrief: a) What approach worked that should be reused? b) What failed that should be avoided? c) Did Gary correct me in a way that reveals a preference? If any non-trivial answers, write to appropriate memory/ file. 5) Update sessions/scratchpad.md with final state.

BLOCKING SAVE BEFORE COMPACTION: This is mandatory — do ALL of these before allowing compaction: 1) Scan recent conversation for evolve signals and append unlogged ones to sessions/evolve_signals.md. 2) Update sessions/scratchpad.md with FULL current task state, key decisions, dead ends, and files being edited — this is the only bridge across compaction. 3) Update memory/L1_essential.md 'Current Focus' section. 4) If any plan is in progress, write the current step number and plan state to scratchpad. 5) Write a 1-line checkpoint to scratchpad: 'COMPACTION CHECKPOINT: {what was being done} at {step}'. Only after ALL steps complete should compaction proceed.
